title: continuity-freshness.ts reuses 'invalid_frontmatter' code for both fail and warn
evidence: buildFail at :141 and buildWarn at :171 both emit code 'invalid_frontmatter' with different statuses; JSON consumers cannot discriminate graph-metadata-unreadable (fail) from frontmatter-malformed (warn).
recommendation: Rename buildFail case to 'invalid_graph_metadata' or split union.

title: T-CNS-03 sibling-sweep was not uniform — 2 batches 1h03m apart
evidence: Batch A (6 folders at 14:42:34.216Z..302Z): 011,012,014,015,016,017. Batch B (11 folders at 15:45:19.000Z): 001,002,003,004,005,006,007,008,009,010,013. Millisecond-precision vs .000Z truncation suggests manual backfill.
recommendation: Update closing-pass text to reflect 2-pass method; investigate Batch B provenance.

title: 017 description.json stub is one of 6+ sub-threshold siblings
evidence: 008=238B, 010=245B, 007=264B, 009=265B, 015=538B, 014=533B — all below iter-5 stub threshold of 556B. Memory-indexing visibility degraded uniformly across these 6 folders.
recommendation: Bulk generate-description.js sweep across 026-tree to restore full-fidelity descriptions.

title: backfill-research-metadata.ts writeGraphMetadataFile swallows ENOENT on success path
evidence: finally { fs.unlinkSync(tempPath) } always fires but tempPath is already renamed on success; catch block swallows ENOENT. Functionally safe but fabricates an exception path. fs.rmSync(path, { force: true }) would be cleaner.
recommendation: Replace unlinkSync+catch with rmSync({ force: true }).

title: check-normalizer-lint.sh env var injection surface
evidence: SPECKIT_NORMALIZER_LINT_TARGET quoted at :10, passed as path arg to grep with set -euo pipefail, explicit --include/--exclude-dir. No injection surface.

title: Iter 9 coverage reconciliation — 4 new findings from 8 unreviewed files
evidence: Iters 1-6 covered ~30/38 focus files. Recovery sweep found 4 findings in 8/38 residual. Extrapolation suggests iter 10 should prioritize handlers/memory-context.ts, handlers/code-graph/query.ts, lib/storage/lineage-state.ts, spec_kit_complete_confirm.yaml or declare convergence.
recommendation: Iter 10: final synthesis with explicit coverage-gap declaration OR probe the 4 large deferred files.
